note: Seed entries from initial reporting; times deliberately coarse until pinned to sources. Superseded by the sourced timeline under verification.

events.title: “Sansad Chalo” march assembles at Jantar Mantar
events.description: Protesters — reported to include large numbers of NEET-UG aspirants, many aged 16–17 — assemble at Jantar Mantar for a march toward Parliament over the NEET-UG paper leaks, demanding the Education Minister's resignation.

events.title: Police lathi-charge the march
events.description: Delhi Police are reported to have lathi-charged protesters as the march moved toward Parliament. Accounts of what triggered the escalation are contested; both protester and police injuries are reported.

events.title: Officers reported without visible badges or name plates
events.description: Multiple accounts report that many deployed officers wore no visible badge numbers or name plates. Badge concealment during a public-order deployment is itself a documented accountability concern, and this archive logs it as evidence.

events.title: Detentions, injuries, and internet shutdowns reported
events.description: Reports indicate 60+ protesters and 118+ police personnel injured, more than two dozen students detained, and internet shutdowns in parts of Delhi.
